description: Short, muted, looping feature walkthrough clips shown in the in-app Help menu ('Watch a quick video'). Keep each clip under ~60 seconds. Provide an .mp4 (H.264) plus a timed .vtt captions file and, optionally, replace the placeholder .poster.svg with a real poster frame. GIFs (.gif) are also supported by the ClipLightbox if preferred over video.
